description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with a central, sculpted stem that extends downward from a wide, rounded ceiling mount. Six gracefully curved arms radiate outward, each ending in a candle-like light holder, giving the fixture a classic and elegant appearance. The metalwork features intricate scrollwork and a weathered, slightly rusted finish, suggesting an antique or vintage style. The candle holders are designed to resemble traditional wax candles, adding to the old-world charm. The overall structure is robust, with the arms symmetrically spaced for balanced illumination. This chandelier would be a striking decorative element in a grand urban interior or a historic public building.
description: An ornate, vintage-style chandelier with six candle-like lights and intricate, weathered metal scrollwork. The fixture features a sculpted central stem and a wide ceiling mount.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of six curved arms and the detailed central stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the scrollwork of the arms and the depth of the ceiling mount.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the even spacing of the candle holders and the ornate metalwork.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the curvature of the arms and the full profile of the central stem.
